interface: /api/v1/groups/rules (Okta management REST API, official OpenAPI spec 2026.07.1)

auth.oauth_alternative: Bearer with okta.groups.read / okta.groups.manage (not exercised by these tests)

query.after: opaque pagination cursor from the Link rel="next" header

list_rules.pagination: responses carry Link rel="self" and, when more pages exist, Link rel="next"; the next URL must be requested verbatim (the mock plants a srvMarker param that dies if the URL is rebuilt); no next link means last page

request_body.name: 1..50 chars
request_body.forbidden: no id/status/created/lastUpdated — rules are created with status INACTIVE

success.body: created GroupRule with server-assigned id, status INACTIVE

replace_rule.preconditions: only INACTIVE rules can be replaced; the actions section is not updatable via PUT (send it unchanged); status transitions never go through PUT

rule_schema.status_note: INVALID is server-assigned; a desired-state spec may only ask for ACTIVE or INACTIVE, and status cannot be flipped by writing the field — only the lifecycle endpoints change it
rule_schema.conditions.expression.type: only valid value is urn:okta:expression:1.0; anything else must be rejected client-side
rule_schema.conditions.expression.value: Okta Expression Language boolean expression, e.g. user.department=="Engineering"
rule_schema.conditions.people.users.exclude: supported: userIds excluded from the rule
rule_schema.conditions.people.groups.exclude: NOT supported by the current API reference — desired specs carrying it must be rejected client-side
rule_schema.actions.assignUserToGroups.groupIds: array of target group ids; compare as a set (order carries no meaning)

reconciler_semantics_pinned_by_tests.missing: POST create (no status/id in body) then lifecycle activate if desired ACTIVE
reconciler_semantics_pinned_by_tests.expression_or_name_drift: deactivate if currently ACTIVE, PUT with actions unchanged, re-activate if desired ACTIVE
reconciler_semantics_pinned_by_tests.action_drift: deactivate (if ACTIVE) + DELETE + POST recreate + activate (if desired ACTIVE) — actions cannot be edited in place
reconciler_semantics_pinned_by_tests.invalid_spec: rejected with a reason naming the offending field; never reaches the API

mock_fixture.org_base_url: loopback http://127.0.0.1:{port} standing in for https://{yourOktaDomain}
mock_fixture.pagination_cursor: after=0pr1a2b3c4RULEbbbb02 with srvMarker=hold planted in the next URL
